title: aralia bipinnata var. apoensis
intro: Aralia bipinnata var. apoensis, also known as Apo Mountain Aralia, is a plant species in the Araliaceae family, native to the Philippines. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions. The plant has been traditionally used to reduce pain and inflammation, and its health benefits also include antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. Aralia bipinnata var. apoensis is often prepared as a tea or decoction for its medicinal uses, and it may also be used in capsule or tincture form.
